stories.title: Former defensive lineman Aldon Smith dies at 36
stories.summary: Aldon Smith, who played six seasons in the NFL with the 49ers, Raiders and Cowboys, died on Saturday at age 36.

stories.title: Harden charged with unlawful carrying of weapon
stories.summary: Cavaliers guard James Harden was arrested early Saturday morning in Houston and has been charged with a misdemeanor unlawful carrying of a weapon.

stories.title: Vinícius Jr. rescues draw for Brazil against Moroc...
stories.summary: Vinícius Júnior scored a fine equalizing goal to earn Brazil a draw with Morocco as both teams opened their World Cup campaigns Saturday at MetLife Stadium.

stories.title: Ramirez breaks bone in left hand as Guardians win
stories.summary: Cleveland Guardians veteran third baseman Jose Ramirez, 33, a seven-time American League All-Star, broke a bone in his left hand on a swing Saturday during his team's 3-1 victory over the Detroit Tigers and will be sidelined an indefinite period.

stories.title: Ticketmaster: No Game 5 tickets will be revoked
stories.summary: After blowback from Knicks fans and New York officials, Ticketmaster clarified that no tickets to Game 5 in San Antonio will be revoked.
